$comment: 0.7.0 daemon architecture: Node spawns kongcode-mcp (thin client). mcp-client either connects to an already-running kongcode-daemon or forks one detached. Daemon owns SurrealStore + BGE-M3 + all tool/hook handlers. The 'mcp-server.js' legacy single-process entry point is still present in dist/ for emergency rollback (just point command back at it).
